title: Town and Country Planning Act, Chapter 20:01
summary: Planning law governing planning schemes, approval procedures, local authority roles and development control.

title: Municipal and District Councils Act, Chapter 28:01
summary: Principal legislation for municipal and district councils, including local administration, property, works, rates, markets, sanitation and public services.

title: Local Government Act, Chapter 28:02
summary: Provides for central administration, village and country districts, local authorities, officers, estimates, rates and general local administration powers.

title: Local Authorities (Elections) Act, Chapter 28:03
summary: Sets out the legal framework for local authority elections, voter registration, supervision and election procedures.

title: Local Democratic Organs Act, Chapter 28:09
summary: Establishes local democratic organs, regional democratic councils and neighbourhood democratic councils, with their objectives, powers and governance structure.

title: Valuation for Rating Purposes Act, Chapter 28:04
summary: Governs valuation lists, objections, appeals and related procedures for rating and property valuation purposes.

title: Local Government Commission Act 2013
summary: Establishes the Local Government Commission, including its composition, functions, investigations, officers, budget and accounts.

title: Draft Integrated Solid Waste Management Bill 2026
summary: Draft bill setting the national framework for solid waste governance, planning, licensing, enforcement, offences, fees and extended producer responsibility.

title: Draft Integrated Solid Waste Management Regulations 2026
summary: Draft regulations supporting the proposed waste management bill with operational rules, procedures and compliance requirements.
